title: centaurea yaltirikii subsp. yaltirikii
intro: Centaurea yaltirikii subsp. yaltirikii is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its vibrant yellow flowers and medicinal properties. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to offer health benefits such as antioxidant, antimicrobial, and antitumor activities. Centaurea yaltirikii subsp. yaltirikii can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are typically consumed orally or applied topically as a treatment for various health conditions.
